assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing Security Configuration section with Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories unchanged
assertion_results.evidence: The Security Configuration section in claude-md-result.md is byte-identical to the reference file (diff produces no output). All three subsections are preserved exactly: Product Lifecycle (5 fields including Product pages URL, Jira version prefix, Vulnerability issue type ID, Component label pattern, VEX Justification custom field), Version Streams (1 stream: 2.1.x with all columns), and Source Repositories (2 repos: backend and frontend-ui with URLs).

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md reports that Security Configuration is already fully configured or up to date
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 8 states: 'Security Configuration section exists and is fully populated: Product Lifecycle: all 5 fields have values (no {{placeholder}} markers), Version Streams: 1 stream configured with all columns populated, Source Repositories: 2 repositories configured with all columns populated. Security Configuration is up to date.' The Result section also states: 'Project Configuration is up to date -- no changes needed.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration was preserved with no changes needed
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md contains the table row: '| Security Configuration | Preserved | No modifications -- all subsections fully populated |' and the header states: 'Project Configuration is up to date -- no changes needed.' The final line confirms: 'No sections were added, removed, or modified. All existing entries were preserved unchanged.'

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT offer the Security Configuration opt-in prompt — it detects the section already exists and is fully populated (idempotency skip)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 8 detects the existing section and reports it as 'fully populated' and 'up to date' without any mention of offering an opt-in prompt. changes-log.md shows Security Configuration status as 'Preserved' with 'No modifications'. There is no evidence in any output file of the opt-in prompt being offered to the user.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Repository Registry entries (backend and frontend-ui) unchanged
assertion_results.evidence: The Repository Registry section in claude-md-result.md is byte-identical to the reference file (diff produces no output). Both entries are preserved: '| backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/backend |' and '| frontend-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/frontend-ui |'.
